hero.headline: Write smarter, organize better.
hero.subheadline: A powerful rich text editor with cloud sync, version history, and export to any format.

features.title: Everything you need to write
features.subtitle: Richly combines a powerful editor with smart tools to keep you productive.

editor.title: Rich Text Editor
editor.description: Format text with bold, italic, headings, tables and more — all in a clean, distraction-free interface.

sync.title: Cloud Sync
sync.description: Access your notes from any device. Everything is saved automatically and synced in real time.

history.title: Version History
history.description: Never lose your work. Browse and restore previous versions of any note with one click.

export.title: Export Anywhere
export.description: Download your notes as HTML, Markdown or plain text — ready to share or publish.

benefits.title: Why Richly?
benefits.fast: Blazing fast — saves as you type

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your workflow.

cta.headline: Ready to write better?
cta.subheadline: Join thousands of writers using Richly every day.
